channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Weirdly, A City Full Of Insane Actual Communists Is Experiencing A Financial Crisis
item.description: Blue states, and blue cities, have gone floridly and relentlessly insane. There is no problem they can solve.

item.title: Hints of Spring
item.description: Time to build again.

item.title: Hillary Clinton is testifying as part of the House investigation into Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton is testifying before U.S. House lawmakers in New York on Thursday as part of a congressional investigation i...

item.title: To Stop The Emerging Anticulture, We Must Escape The Digital ‘Machine’
item.description: Paul Kingsnorth's latest book, Against the Machine: On the Unmaking of Humanity , has the makings of a classic that may help us all rediscover faith a...

item.title: Yes, Celebrate the U.S. Men’s Hockey Team
item.description: Leftists can never put politics aside.

item.title: FBI subpoena of phone records leaves Trump chief of staff 'in shock': report
item.description: White House chief of staff Susie Wiles reportedly "in shock" after learning FBI subpoenaed her phone records during Trump probe under Jack Smith.

item.title: AI Laws Need a Kill Switch
item.description: There is a better way to regulate this rapidly changing technology.

item.title: Inconvenient fact about the Epstein files: they’re missing Trump mentions that have appeared in the press
item.description: “Several individuals and news outlets have recently flagged files ... that they claim appear to be missing,” the Justice Department said in a post on ...

item.title: JP Morgan Chase Admits to Closing Trump’s Accounts After Capitol Riot
item.description: The key factor in this case, for Chase, is risk .

item.title: Melania Trump to take the gavel at UN Security Council in historic first
item.description: FIRST ON FOX: Melania Trump is set to make history as the first first lady to preside over the United Nations Security Council, with a speech focused ...

item.title: Petition seeks to rename Arkansas' Bill and HIllary Clinton airport over Epstein association
item.description: A Change.org petition is calling for removing the names of former President Bill Clinton and first lady Hillary Clinton from an airport in Little Rock...

item.title: The great (small business) wealth transfer: McKinsey sees $5 trillion of baby boomer companies coming up for sale over the next decade
item.description: Move over, Great Wealth Transfer. The McKinsey Institute for Economic Mobility sees the next decade as make or break for the Great Ownership Transfer.

item.title: Detransitioner: ‘Gender-Affirming Care’ Was The Least Caring Thing Ever Done To Me
item.description: What saved me was not affirmation of untruth but affirmation of reality.

item.title: Why Pennsylvania sits at the center of the big data-center power problem
item.description: Its old, slow and sits at the center of both the midAtlantic and Midwestern regional grids. What could go wrong?

item.title: The Supreme Court Shows Its Work
item.description: The least democratic branch of the federal government is the most transparent.

item.title: GOP pushes to hold sanctuary jurisdictions’ ‘feet to the fire’ in state where Laken Riley was killed
item.description: Georgia Republicans are introducing a bill to hold sanctuary jurisdictions financially accountable for damage and crimes committed by illegal immigran...

item.title: Commerce Secretary Lutnick meets with Indian trade official after Supreme Court tariff ruling
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick met Thursday with India's trade minister, a sign the countries remain engaged after a Supreme Court ruling upended P...

item.title: No joke: White House Correspondents Association taps mentalist as dinner headliner
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Association is once again ditching its tradition of having a comedian perform at its annual dinner and tapped mentalis...

item.title: Dem governor doubles down on transgender protections after Trump State of the Union
item.description: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer vows to veto anti-LGBTQ legislation, directly challenging Trump's push to ban minors' gender transitions nationwide.

item.title: Trump admin asks Supreme Court to end temporary protected status for Syrian migrants
item.description: In a new filing, the Trump administration is requesting that the Supreme Court intervene so that DHS Secretary Kristi Noem can end TPS for Syrians.

item.title: The remote work fight isn’t over: Workers are willing to take a major pay cut, up to 25%, Harvard study shows
item.description: Harvard, Brown, and UCLA researchers found workers would be willing to take a massive pay cut to work from home.

item.title: The BAFTA Tourette racial slur controversy, explained, by a sociologist with Tourette’s who studies social stigma
item.description: Tourette syndrome remains a deeply misunderstood condition, especially when it comes to obscene language tics, called coprolalia.

item.title: DHS arrested 261 DACA 'Dreamers' last year; almost all had criminal records
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security arrested 261 people who were here under the Obama-era DACA deportation amnesty program and had deported 86 of them...

item.title: Striking Down Tariffs, SCOTUS Gives Congress Permission To Be Useless
item.description: The judges let Congress off the hook, further incentivizing the legislature’s dereliction while effectively usurping power from the political branches...

item.title: CBS Sets Out to Debunk Trump, Ends Up Proving Him Right
item.description: The '60 Minutes' report fixates on a semantic issue while conceding the underlying reality of violence against white farmers in South Africa.

item.title: Geopolitical Risk and Portfolio Oversight
item.description: A framework for identifying material geopolitical shocks, translating them into portfolio impacts, and documenting risk for oversight and governance. ...

item.title: Aligning Allocation to the Global Business Cycle
item.description: Static portfolios lag macro shifts. Predefined cycle triggers help practitioners adjust risk before markets reprice. The post Aligning Allocation to t...

item.title: Building Commitment to Long-Term Investing
item.description: Why clients stall on long-term investing and how reframing commitment around flexibility unlocks forward momentum. The post Building Commitment to Lon...

item.title: Why Static Portfolios Fail When Risk Regimes Change
item.description: Why static portfolio frameworks fail when risk regimes shift, drawing lessons from the very different market breakdowns of 2020 and 2022. The post Why...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...
